breakdown: This PR fixes a bug in streaming passthrough where LLM-generated rewards boxes use non-standard keys ('xp'/'gold_pieces' instead of 'xp_gained'/'gold'). The fix adds fallback logic in normalize_rewards_box_for_ui() to handle both key variants and applies normalization before persisting the rewards. The new E2E test is substantive and tests the actual fix by prompting the LLM to produce messy keys. Minor gaps: minimal type annotations shown in truncated diff, and some defensive code could benefit from typed exceptions.
key_changes: Add fallback key handling in normalize_rewards_box_for_ui: check 'xp'/'gold_pieces' if 'xp_gained'/'gold' are absent
Pop normalized fallback keys after extracting values to clean up payload
Call normalize_rewards_box_for_ui() in _resolve_canonical_level_up_ui_pair() before returning passthrough_rewards
Add E2E test file testing streaming passthrough normalization with messy LLM-generated keys
